info.title: BigBike Backend API
info.description: REST API for BigBike — Vietnam's premium motorcycle marketplace. Rewrite of WordPress backend. All endpoints return ApiDataResponse<T> or ApiListResponse<T> envelopes.

tags.name: Public Catalog
tags.description: Public product, category, brand reads — no auth required

tags.name: Public Content
tags.description: Public article and page reads — no auth required

tags.name: Public Settings
tags.description: Public site settings subset — no auth required

tags.name: Public Menus
tags.description: Public navigation menus (ACTIVE only) — no auth required

tags.name: Order Lookup
tags.description: Guest order status lookup by order number + key

tags.name: Customer Auth
tags.description: Customer registration, login, session refresh and logout

tags.name: Customer Profile
tags.description: Authenticated customer profile — requires customer session cookie

tags.name: Cart
tags.description: Guest and authenticated cart management — CSRF required on mutations

tags.name: Checkout
tags.description: Cart checkout and quick-buy — CSRF required

tags.name: Customer Orders
tags.description: Customer's own order history — requires customer session cookie

tags.name: Admin Auth
tags.description: Admin JWT login, refresh, logout and profile

tags.name: Admin Catalog
tags.description: Admin product, category, brand CRUD — requires Admin JWT

tags.name: Admin Content
tags.description: Admin article and page CRUD — requires Admin JWT

tags.name: Admin Orders
tags.description: Admin order list, detail, status update and notes — requires Admin JWT

tags.name: Admin Customers
tags.description: Admin customer list, detail, update and status — requires Admin JWT

tags.name: Admin Media
tags.description: Admin media list, detail, metadata update and logical delete — requires Admin JWT

tags.name: Admin Redirects
tags.description: Admin URL redirect CRUD — requires Admin JWT

tags.name: Admin Settings
tags.description: Admin site settings read/update — requires Admin JWT

tags.name: Admin Menus
tags.description: Admin menu and menu item CRUD + reorder — requires Admin JWT

tags.name: Admin Coupons
tags.description: Admin coupon CRUD and status management — requires Admin JWT

get.summary: Get product by ID or slug

get.description: Returns all SiteSettings where isPublic=true. No authentication required.
Returns the menu at the given location with ACTIVE items only. Returns 404 if menu is INACTIVE.

get.summary: Guest order lookup by number and key

200.description: Login successful. Sets bb_session, bb_refresh, and bb_csrf cookies.

post.summary: Refresh customer session using refresh cookie

get.description: Returns the current guest or authenticated cart. Creates a new guest cart if none exists. Sets bb_guest_id and bb_csrf cookies.

post.description: Requires X-CSRF-Token header matching bb_csrf cookie value.

get.summary: Get available shipping and payment options

post.description: Creates an order from the current cart. Requires X-CSRF-Token header.

post.summary: Quick buy — single item direct purchase
Admin login — returns JWT access and refresh tokens

200.description: Media detail — includes storageProvider but not storage bucket

204.description: Media deleted (logical, no physical file removed)

patch.description: Sensitive keys (containing secret/password/token/privatekey/private_key/api_key/apikey/accesskey/access_key/client_secret/clientsecret) cannot be set isPublic=true. Updating the value of a sensitive key is allowed as long as isPublic is not set to true.

delete.summary: Delete menu and all its items (physical)

post.summary: Reorder menu items (batch set parentId + sortOrder)
post.description: Validates that no cycles are created and all parentIds belong to the same menu.

patch.description: Allowed statuses: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, EXPIRED, ARCHIVED.

AdminBearerAuth.description: Admin JWT access token. Obtain via POST /api/v1/auth/login. Header: Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>

CustomerSession.name: bb_session
CustomerSession.description: Customer session cookie. Set automatically after POST /api/v1/customer/auth/login.

CsrfHeader.name: X-CSRF-Token
CsrfHeader.description: CSRF token required for all cart/checkout mutations. Value must match the bb_csrf cookie set by the server.

Conflict.description: Resource conflict (e.g. duplicate email or code)

ApiErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope used by all error responses
